items.name_cn:
Chanel 24k Handle Flap Bag
CF Large Mini Handbag Black Lambskin
Purchased from the counter for 44,500 RMB
The CF gold chain is versatile for all seasons and I love it more the more I look at it 〰️. I am truly in love with the styling of this CF Large Mini. It easily handles the premium lambskin texture and has an excellent temperament!
Those who choose this are definitely the King of Fad ✔️
Leather: Peretti ZP Lambskin
Dimensions: 12*20*6 cm
Model: AS2431

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24k hobo
Size: 17*24*5cm Red
New 24k shoulder bag, really love it, a Liu Wen style
Compared to the chunky gold chain from last season or the metal chain, this one is the closest to perfection
The difference is the top trim is now a CC logo, looks super good
Love the capacity, it's the perfect size
Gives off a lazy yet refined vibe, highly recommended
Model No. AS5177

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24K Popcorn Popcorn🍿️
Size: 16*11*7cm
The 24K expensive Popcorn evening bag, is there any beauty who wants to own it? Fashion item, stylish item, showcasing personality charm Popcorn bucket Chanel, 24K Popcorn bucket, this is likely another player's item, probably another six-figure item. To be honest, compared to the previous guitar and tea box, I get the Popcorn bucket more, the pearl popcorn is quite unique (exquisite). What do you all think? 24K Chanel, exclusive online POP COCO Popcorn, I love this so much
Model: AS5217

Chanel 24K Rhinestone Turn-lock Tote

Model: 96102

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24N Red Tweed Crossbody Bag
A touch of red for winter ❤️ Jennie's same ski series, I love this red crossbody so much, it's quite eye-catching 🤩 Material is soft wool felt, very light. The red is beautiful, the strap is adjustable for crossbody or shoulder, both look great~ Retro and festive red, super suitable for Christmas 🎄 and Chinese New Year 🧨 Must get one
(18×30×8cm)

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24P Denim Trash Bag
Size: 35x37x7(cm)
The 24P Spring/Summer series has released a new denim style. Compared to the 22 old model, the main difference is the gradient visual effect on the body and the grand diamond quilt. The new diamond quilt is full of ingenuity! Created with white and dark blue stitching, it forms a three-dimensional effect from light to dark that matches the blue body perfectly. It still uses matching leather-wrapped chain, and all hardware is silver, which looks great with the blue! A touch of coolness amidst the fashion~
Style No. AS3260

specs.rawTitle:
Chanel 24P Denim Trash Bag
Size: 35x37x7(cm)
The 24P Spring/Summer series has released a new denim style. Compared to the 22 old model, the main difference is the gradient visual effect on the body and the grand diamond quilt. The new diamond quilt is full of ingenuity! Created with white and dark blue stitching, it forms a three-dimensional effect from light to dark that matches the blue body perfectly. items.name_cn:
Chanel 24P mini Denim Trash Bag
Size: 20x19x6(cm)
22bag mini | It's denim season again. The new 24bag denim mini has really won me over! White topstitching and blue denim are a fashion statement SOS. Matching color chain and silver hardware are casual yet refined~
The bag capacity is completely sufficient! Super surprising~
Seeing this mini, I can't wait for summer~
Style No. AS3980

items.name_en: Chanel 24S Black Gold Wax Leather Fan Chain Bag is truly stunning! Retro and gorgeous, exquisite like a piece of art! Double-layer fan bag shape, large capacity, can hold 2 phones 📱, very practical 😄. The large logo design is also special, giving a blingbling feeling, so exquisite and nice~ The wax leather is very unique! Feels very durable. Matches any outfit to elevate your elegance 🆙🆙🆙 Size: 18.5 X 14.5

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24s Denim Gradient
Size: 10x20x7cm
The new 24s Denim series is a must-have. I love this Chanel denim style and couldn't wait to get it. It may seem like a picky color, but it will surprise you. Wearing it makes you the most unique and eye-catching fairy. Elegance and fashion are its synonyms. The gradient denim color, paired with a navy leather chain and vintage hardware, is hard not to love. Available in CF 20cm and 25cm sizes. The capacity is more than enough for shopping or dates. Having one for each of us and our besties is just beautiful. This is a super long-lasting bestseller you can carry for years.

items.name_cn:
CHANEL 24s Glitter CF
Size: 20(cm)
New 24s glitter is here. Compared to other models, this one features a mix of matte and glitter, making it extremely difficult to produce. The soft blue~ lively pink~ are like a splash of bright color in a dream, radiating a charming color palette. Whether it's the soft texture or the exquisite chain, it looks super good~
